programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles are taken prisoners by the Wolves. But Laval is determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue ... but something about ShadoWind isn't quite right.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik pretends to retire, and lures Sonic and Tails into a phony vacation resort, laden with booby-traps set by Scratch and Grounder. But Sonic takes the bungee jumping, hang gliding, and skydiving in stride, and gives the bashes the bots.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a giant AMNESIA RAY in his booby-trapped PINBALL FORTRESS (based on the Sonic game per Roger Hector) in order to erase the bad memories the Mobius citizens have of him, and make them think he's a great guy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Lifestyles of the Sick and Twisted
programme.desc: Throbbin Screech brings a TV crew to interview Robotnik for "Lifestyles of the Sick and Twisted". Robotnik rampages through the Mobius countryside proving how sick and twisted he is, and Sonic is kept busy doing rescues. Tails decides to take on...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Momma Robotnik forces her son to run for President of Mobius with Wes Weasley as his campaign manager.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a flute-playing Ninja crane, taps his martial arts knowledge, and transfers it to Scratch and Grounder.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails find an underground world of diamonds, but they are held captive there by a miserly Mole-Troll. When Robotnik comes to capture them, he accidently frees them from the Mole-Troll, who teams up with Sonic and Tails to defend his riches.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell - a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to. Burpy can't make it on his own, so Eli vows to take him there. He convinces the Shadow Clan to point the way, but the journey is fraught with peril. Meanwhile the rest of the Shane Gang must fight side by side with the Shadow Clan when Blakk's minions attack.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious creature is draining the energy from all the slugs in a distant cavern, and the residents are offering a rich reward to whoever can stop it. Mercenaries come out of the woodwork hoping for the prize, but the Shane Gang aim to stop it for free. That's what they do. It turns out this creature is more dangerous than anyone could imagine, and one by one, the hunters are taken out of the game-leaving only Eli and the reviled STOCKER remaining.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli's got a new slug recruit! But in the heat of battle, can this rookie go from frightened novice to the hero of the day?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk and his Darkbane minions have discovered a way to make their ghouls faster and stronger - giving them an edge over the Shane Gang. In order to even the odds, Eli is going to need his most powerful slugs and an upgraded blaster from Redhook. The only problem is, Dr. Blakk already has the slingersmith working for him... Eli and the gang attempt a daring rescue mission to free Redhook, but along the way discover Blakk has a much more sinister plan in the works.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has succeeded in creating a gap in the magical slug-energy barrier that protects Slugterra, opening the way for the evil Darkbane to tunnel their way up from the Deep Caverns. Eli and the Shane gang must stop this at any cost. Now armed with a selection of upgraded slugs, blasters and armor, they take the battle to Dr. Blakk's front door. While his team slugs it out against Dr. Blakk's minions, Eli takes on Blakk himself once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Dark Slinger and his marauders have invaded Slugterra! But there's more to this new threat than meets the eye. Eli must fight a very different kind of duel to save Slugterra...and himself.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A new member joins the Shane Gang! His name is Junjie, and he is a master of the mysterious slugslinging art of Slug Fu. But even with the power of five slingers, the Shane Gang find themselves in over their heads trying to protect the ancient Elemental Slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang and Junjie race across the 99 caverns to keep the Elemental Slugs out of the hands of the Goon.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: To save Slugterra and the Elemental Slugs reaches its climax as the Shane Gang face a final showdown.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: As Kord, Trixie and Pronto struggle to keep the wily Elemental Slugs out of the wrong hands, Eli and Junjie's Slug Fu training is cut short by a madman.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Journey to the Eastern Caverns
programme.desc: Eli and the Gang find a way to take Junjie back home to the Eastern Caverns-and find a whole bunch of trouble waiting for them when they get there!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Upon returning to the Outlaws' jungle camp, the Shane Gang suffer a sneak attack from the Emperor's Underlord Holt, who steals almost all of their slugs and loads them onto the Dragon Train for transport to the Emperor. With precious few slugs to use as ammo, the Shane Gang must be extra resourceful to get them back.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In a climactic battle, Junjie and Eli confront the Emperor and the Dai-Fu as the fate of the entire Eastern Caverns hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: The "don't try this at home" warning seen on some TV shows doesn't apply to this series, which encourages the discovery of scientific concepts through experiments that viewers can reproduce in their own homes. Science teacher Steve Spangler hosts the show, providing step-by-step demonstrations of the DIY experiments that help explain scientific principles. Among the experiments presented is one that gained Spangler fame, in which he showed what happens when a mint candy is dropped into a bottle of diet soda. On the show, he explains the "why" and "how" behind the experiment and what cause the soda to react with the candy.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Aracely no aguanta más y, a punta de pistola, amenaza a Mario para que la deje en paz. Sara pone en marcha el rescate de Dóriga. Salvador entiende que no debe enredarse con Begoña.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara ejecuta el rescate de Dóriga, Salvador participa, dispara a matar o morir y le da a un federal. Miriam intenta negociar con el procurador. Josefina llama a Berta para poder rastrearla.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Miriam insiste en la inocencia de su hijo y Pedro le augura una vida en prisión. Salvador traza el mapa a Los Ángeles, a través de los túneles, sin saber que el Teca tiene sus propios planes.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara y Berta pelean en un canje de rehenes y, cuando creen tener el control, se disparan las alarmas. Mario lanza su sistema de distribución con drones. Salvador va a Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Salvador entra al túnel, pero lo que no sabe es que el Teca sigue sus pasos y podría ser usado como carnada para dar con su madre. Dóriga le confiesa su amor a Sara. La Tuti consuela a otro hombre.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Quintanilla acusa al Gallo de traición y Erick lo desafía. El Teca encuentra una nueva manera de humillar a Berta. Sara descubre que Tuti es la soplona.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Traición con traición se paga y Quintanilla entiende que la vida le pasó factura. Sara llega a su límite con la Tuti, quien puede no ser la única embarazada de la casa.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Manuel va con la Tuti a hacerse la prueba de compatibilidad. Josefina también se hace la prueba de embarazo. Temeroso, Alfredo pone en marcha su próxima misión. El Indio ayuda a Berta.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: El Indio lleva a Berta a un lugar seguro, pero ella está débil. Manuel ayuda a Salvador y a Begoña a regresar a México. La Tuti llama a Álvaro con serias noticias. El Teca castiga a Alfredo.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Mientras Olga cuidaba a su padre, su hermana Glory administraba la empresa familiar, pero pronto la arruinó. La hija de Mónica se puso siliconas y la anestesia le causó una reacción mortal.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Entre caballeros Orina de pie para que no te violen
programme.desc: Juan Carlos y Ernesto vienen como caballeros a pedir que cada cual acate la elección de la mujer que aman. Las camareras de un bar han ideado un sistema para evitar los abusos sexuales.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Compito como mujer Me golpeas, me pagas
programme.desc: Tania cambió de sexo de hombre a mujer, pero Juan Carlos no le permite participar como atleta femenina. Gustavo cumplió condena por golpear a su novia Teresa, y ahora ella exige una compensación.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Una joven recluta mujeres para que se embaracen y vende la placenta, pero la mafia la amenaza. Marlon y Junior contratan a una prostituta para tener sexo anal sin luz, pero resultó ser un travesti.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: René debe operarse de cáncer, pero su esposa le hace esperar a que los astros se alineen, y él decide pedir ayuda. Obligaron a Rubén a casarse, pero luego descubrió que lo engañaron para obtener los papeles.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Abril acusa a Geraldine de provocarle el aborto y matar a su hijo ahora, le exige 100 mil dólares. Para sanar el cáncer, Rita contrató a Rosita para hacerle sexo oral y ella la demanda por acoso.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Lucía confundió a Patricio con un delincuente y lo metió preso, ahora él exige compensación. Katerine aumentó el tamaño de su trasero, pero le inyectaron biopolímeros que le causan problemas.

programme.title: Caso cerrado

programme.title: La edad de los grandes felinos: El origen

programme.desc: Los pequeños tendrán que dar su mejor esfuerzo y demostrar su talento en el escenario, ya que cuatro cantantes, junto con cuatro bailarinas, serán eliminados en el primer duelo de la competencia.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Galilea Montijo presenta los escuadrones que participan en la competencia. Entre los jueces destacan: Bianca Marroquín, Raquel Ortega, Pierre Angelo, Noel Schajris, María José y Manuel Ibáñez. Además de contar con la presencia de Gloria Trevi.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Tito el Bambino y Adrián Uribe
programme.desc: Durante la emisión se conocerán los primeros equipos sentenciados. Además no faltará la música interpretada por los pequeños, baile y chistes con la participación de los jueces. Entre los invitados se encuentran Tito el Bambino y Adrian Uribe.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Pepe Aguilar, Danna Paola y Dulce María

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La desgracia de un hombre que con fuerza y voluntad cambió su vida tratando de ayudar a sus seres amados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Edición especial supremacistas: Las redes del odio
programme.desc: Se muestran a los nuevos supremacistas y se analiza la manera en la que utilizan los medios sociales para atraer a nuevos miembros.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La violencia se ha apoderado de las vidas de miles de mujeres que han sido asesinadas brutalmente por sus propias parejas, por lo que los movimientos contra feminicidios han incrementado considerablemente.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Algunos fueron perseguidos y separados de sus familias, otros llevados a campos de concentración y exterminados, hoy, algunos de los sobrevivientes narran el horror del holocausto judío.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: La vida en juego: fútbol y violencia en la frontera
programme.desc: Un programa especial que muestra la vida de cuatro jugadores de fútbol americano en Brownsville, Texas, quienes se enfrentan a una dura realidad de violencia, pobreza, drogas, pero siempre con ilusión de una vida mejor.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una mujer de buen corazón es asesinada por su esposo, un hombre manipulador y frío quien dejó abandonada a su propia hija en los brazos de su madre fallecida.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Narcosubmarinos: Viaje al fondo del mal

programme.title: Gonzalo Rubalcaba, Ron Carter & Jul Barretto
programme.desc: 'Münchner Klaviersommer' was an annual concerts series that took place from 1981 to 1998 in Munich, Germany. Although the festival's name suggests a strong focus on piano music, it featured countless famous musicians from jazz and classical music – not just pianists. The concerts were usually held in July at The Gasteig, home of the Munich Philharmonic. In 1994, Cuban pianist Gonzalo Rubalcaba was one of the artists appearing here. With bassist Ron Carter - one of the living legends on this instrument - and highly talented Cuban jazz drummer Julio Barreto, Rubalcaba's trio marks an important step in the development of jazz trio playing in the 1990s. Moreover, it demonstrates the brilliant improvisational and technical abilities of Gonzalo Rubalcaba, who has become one of our present-day jazz legends.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: John Coltrane
programme.desc: Explore the music of one of the most influential and innovative saxophonists in jazz history: John Coltrane! Immerse yourself in this collection of remarkable performances from the early 1960s that showcase Coltrane's unparalleled artistry and unique sound during a transformative period in the artist's career. Recorded in various European cities, Coltrane is seen playing the songs “Autumn Leaves”, “Hackensack”, “My Favorite Things”, “I Want To Talk About You”, “Vigil”, and “Naima”. Tune in and experience why the music of John Coltrane has touched the lives of so many!

programme.title: Kurt Rosenwinkel, Tim Motzer & Gintas Janusonis
programme.desc: Jazzfest Bonn is an annual festival of modern and creative jazz music. Every May it presents local and international jazz musicians in concert halls all over the German city. Among the artists of the 2017 edition is Bandit 65, a trio of breathtaking virtuosity, great power, boundless breadth, and astounding beauty. Together with Tim Motzer on guitar and electronics, and Gintas Janusonis on drums and percussion, guitarist and band leader Kurt Rosenwinkel explores the intersection of guitars, rhythm, electronics, soundscapes, free improvisation, and telepathic interplay.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Dexter Gordon, George Gruntz, Guy Pedersen & Daniel Humair
programme.desc: Dexter Gordon: Live in '63 & '64 features three concerts filmed in Holland, Switzerland, and Belgium that highlight the bebop legend's classic style and silky tone. These shows feature legendary side musicians such as Art Taylor (drums) and Kenny Drew (piano), and jazz classics “Blues Walk”, “A Night In Tunisia”, “Body And Soul”, and others. One of the most influential saxophonists in jazz history, Dexter Gordon is captured in sharp form and style in this 70-minute tour de force.

programme.title: Sarah Vaughan
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery, Pim Jacobs, Ruud Jacobs & Han Bennink
programme.sub-title: Guitarlegend Wes Montgomery in The Netherlands
programme.desc: Wes Montgomery: Live in '65 shines a light on one of the most unique and influential guitarists in music history. These beautifully filmed programs from the spring of 1965 feature Wes, in intimate studio settings, leading three different lineups through some of his best-known tunes, including “Four On Six”, “Jingles”, and “West Coast Blues”. This rare footage, featuring rehearsals, between-song banter, and closeup camera angles, illuminates Wes's extraordinary musical vocabulary and unconventional picking technique.

programme.title: Adrien Perruchon, Symfonieorkest Vlaanderen & Josef Špaček
programme.sub-title: Works by Ravel, Lalo, Ginastera a. o.
programme.desc: French conductor Adrien Perruchon and the Flanders Symphony Orchestra take us on a musical journey to Argentine, Spain, and Mexico, in this March 1, 2017 concert performance at Concertgebouw Brugge in Belgium. The program opens with Édouard Lalo's Spanish Symphony for violin and orchestra, Op. 21, featuring Czech violinist Josef Špaček as the soloist. This is followed by Mathias Coppens' Music for Orchestra, Op. 12. The program continues with Alberto Ginastera's Dances from Estancia, Op. 8a, and Aaron Copland's El Salón México. Also on the program is Maurice Ravel's famous Boléro. The program comes to a close with Arturo Márquez's Danzón No. 2.

programme.title: Evgeny Kissin, Nikolai Demidenko, Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra & Antoni Wit
programme.desc: Antoni Wit conducts the Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra in performances of Chopin's Piano Concertos No. 1, Op. 11 and No. 2, Op. 21. Soloists are Nikolai Demidenko and Evgeny Kissin. After performing the first concerto, Demidenko encores with Chopin's Mazurka Op. 17/4. Kissin closes the concert with Chopin's Etude Op. 10/12 and the Waltz in E minor, Op. post. This concert was part of the celebration of Chopin's 200th anniversary in 2010. Chopin composed the second concerto one year before the Concerto No. 1 and completed both works at the age of 20, before leaving his home country Poland and moving to Paris.

programme.title: Ballet of the Mariinsky Theatre
programme.desc: 'La Bayadère' is a three-act ballet by the French choreographer Marius Petipa. Set in 19th-century India, 'La Bayadère' tells the sad love story of the noble warrior Solor and his Nikia, a temple dancer or 'bayadère', who is poisoned by her rival, Gamzatti. The ballet features one of the most celebrated scenes of classical ballet, namely 'The Kingdom of the Shades'. In this iconic scene, Solor dreams, under the influence of opium, of reuniting with his beloved Nikia. This production of the ballet features the revised choreography by Vladimir Ponomarev and Vakhtang Chabukiani (1941), and includes dances by Konstantin Sergeyev and Nikolai Zubkovsky. The ballet's music, composed by Ludwig Minkus, is performed by the Mariinsky Orchestra under the direction of Boris Gruzin. Among the performers are Viktoria Tereshkina, Anastasia Matvienko, Vladimir Shklyarov, and Vladimir Ponomarev. This performance was recorded at the Mariinsky Theatre in St. Petersburg, Russia, in July 2014.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.sub-title: Mozart - String Quartet No. 19 in C major, K. 465
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances' string quartet – consisting of David Grimal (violin), Hans Peter Hofmann (violin), David Gaillard (viola), and Xavier Phillips (cello) – performs Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's String Quartet No. 19 in C major, K. 465, ‘Dissonance' (Op. 10 No. 6). The String Quartet is the last in the set of six quartets that were dedicated to Joseph Haydn. Written between 1782 and 1785, these are also known as the Haydn Quartets (Op. 10). String Quartet No. 19 is remarkable for its slow, dissonant introduction, giving the piece its nickname. This ominous passage suddenly gives way to the bright Allegro in C major. This performance was recorded at Opéra Comique in Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: James Brown
programme.desc: James Brown was an American singer, songwriter, record producer, dancer and bandleader. The founding father of funk music and a major figure of 20th century popular music and dance, he is often referred to as the "Godfather of Soul". Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of James Brown.

programme.title: Aretha Franklin
programme.desc: After a period at Columbia Records, Franklin signed to Atlantic Records in 1967, where she achieved her commercial acclaim and success with songs such as "Respect", "(You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman", "Spanish Harlem" and "Think". By the end of the 1960s Franklin's chart dominance soon earned her the title Queen of Soul, while at the same time she also became a symbol of black empowerment during the Civil Rights Movement.

programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Johnny Cash
programme.desc: The film features rare archive interviews with Johnny and the reflections of a team of leading critics and working musicians, including ‘Cowboy' Jack Clement and Bob Wooton and ‘Fluke' Holland from The Tennessee Three. This penetrating critical analysis draws on rare archive footage of Johnny Cash in performance, from radio and television archives around the world tracing the career of the man dubbed ‘the man in black'.

programme.title: The Black Keys
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Jack White
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Bon Jovi
programme.desc: Bon Jovi is an American rock band from Sayreville, New Jersey. Formed in 1983 Thus far, Bon Jovi has released 13 studio albums, plus six compilations and three live albums. The band has sold more than 130 million records worldwide and performed more than 2,700 concerts in over 50 countries for more than 34 million fans. Bon Jovi was inducted into the UK Music Hall of Fame in 2006. The band was also honored with the Award of Merit at the American Music Awards in 2004, and as songwriters and collaborators, Jon Bon Jovi and Richie Sambora were inducted into Songwriters Hall of Fame in 2009 Featuring archive material, music videos and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists Michael Bonner (Uncut Magazine), Hamish MacBain (Shortlist), John Aizlewood (Evening Standard)

programme.title: Journey
programme.desc: Journey is an American rock band that formed in San Francisco in 1973, composed of former members of Santana and Frumious Bandersnatch. The band has gone through several phases its strongest commercial success occurred between 1978 and 1987.

programme.title: Various Artists

programme.title: Lady Gaga
programme.desc: Lady Gaga's performance at the iTunes Festival in London on September 1, 2013 marks the superstar's first full concert since the The Born This Way Ball. It is an eight song set containing the world premiere of seven tracks from her fourth album, ARTPOP: "Aura" "MANiCURE" "Artpop" "Jewels N' Drugs" ft. T.I., Too $hort and Twista "Sexxx Dreams", "Swine" and "I Wanna Be With You", a song that transformed into "Dope" for ARTPOP. During the concert, captured stunningly in HD, Gaga says that she's "a bit like Dorothy right now." The stage is her Kansas, the crowd is her family, and their reunion is pure magic. Lady Gaga, her dancers, and her band traverse through visual and musical themes of love, sex, violence, beauty, danger, empowerment, hustle, lust, and above all ART. Throughout, Gaga lays her heart bare for the audience and the cameras with every note sung and every word spoken.

Captured by filmmaker collaborators Tilo & Yvonne Kühnast, Turtle Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Jason Stephenson.

programme.title: Wonders of New Zealand w Music
programme.desc: Wonders of New Zealand: South Island is a dynamic 4K UHD ambient nature film which showcases the beauty of New Zealand's South Island with ambient real-life nature sounds. For 1 hour you'll be transported from one amazing location to the next, - from the dazzling, other-worldly exotic landscapes of places like Milford Sound /Fiordland National Park, to the world's bluest lake Pukaki, the famous Tree at Lake Wanaka, and many places in between. Feel your worries fade away as you are immersed in the sights & sounds of more than 60 different stunning and alive 4K UHD nature scenes paired to soothing music for total relaxation.

programme.title: Art After Dark: Futuristic Visions
programme.desc: Journey through a mesmerizing universe of art that blends the elements of sci-fi and fantasy, where the bass swings from brooding to bouncy, and the percussive elements provide a backbone that sounds tribal yet otherworldly.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: A colorful journey through time and culture, showcasing the diverse talents of artists with Latin American roots. The artwork is accompanied by mid-tempo tunes with influences that stretch across Reggaeton, Flamenco, Baille, Salsa, and Latin Jazz.

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: Art Buzz

programme.title: Art Buzz
